CatalogTemplateRequest.Property.Value:
<!--freetext--> <xsl:variable name="size" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='HDSIZE']/q:Value/a:string[1]" />
<xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="$size >= 1000"> <xsl:value-of select="concat(format-number($size div 1000, '#.#'), 'TB')" /> </xsl:when>
<xsl:when test="$size >= 1"> <xsl:value-of select="concat(format-number($size, '#.#'), 'GB')" /> </xsl:when>
<xsl:when test="$size < 1"> <xsl:value-of select="concat($size * 1000 , 'MB')" /> </xsl:when> </xsl:choose>

<!--freetext--> <xsl:variable name="type" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='HDTYPEHWARE']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="size" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='HDSIZE']/q:Value/a:string[1]" />
<xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="contains($type, 'HDD') "> <xsl:text>Not Applicable</xsl:text> </xsl:when>
<xsl:when test="$size >= 1000"> <xsl:value-of select="concat(format-number($size div 1000, '#.#'), 'TB')" /> </xsl:when>
<xsl:when test="$size >= 1"> <xsl:value-of select="concat(format-number($size, '#.#'), 'GB')" /> </xsl:when>
<xsl:when test="$size < 1"> <xsl:value-of select="concat($size * 1000 , 'MB')" /> </xsl:when> </xsl:choose>

<!--freetext--> <xsl:variable name="displayPort" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='TOTALDSLPRT']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="dvi" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='TOTALDVI']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="lan" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='LANPORT']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="hdmi" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='HDMI']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="headphone" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='HDPHNJACK']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="usb2" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='USBPRT']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="usb3" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='USBPWR']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="usbC" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='USBCPORTS']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="vga" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='VGA']/q:Value/a:string[1]" />
<xsl:variable name="outputFragmentCollection">
<xsl:if test="$displayPort > 0"> <data> <xsl:value-of select="$displayPort" /> <xsl:text> DisplayPort</xsl:text> <xsl:if test="$displayPort > 1"> <xsl:text>s</xsl:text> </xsl:if> </data> </xsl:if>
<xsl:if test="$dvi > 0"> <data> <xsl:value-of select="$dvi" /> <xsl:text> DVI output</xsl:text> <xsl:if test="$dvi > 1"> <xsl:text>s</xsl:text> </xsl:if> </data> </xsl:if>
<xsl:if test="$lan > 0"> <data> <xsl:value-of select="$lan" /> <xsl:text> lan port</xsl:text> <xsl:if test="$lan > 1"> <xsl:text>s</xsl:text> </xsl:if> </data> </xsl:if>
<xsl:if test="$hdmi > 0"> <data> <xsl:value-of select="$hdmi" /> <xsl:text> HDMI port</xsl:text> <xsl:if test="$hdmi > 1"> <xsl:text>s</xsl:text> </xsl:if> </data> </xsl:if>
<xsl:if test="$headphone > 0"> <data> <xsl:value-of select="$headphone" /> <xsl:text> Headphone Jack</xsl:text> <xsl:if test="$headphone > 1"> <xsl:text>s</xsl:text> </xsl:if> </data> </xsl:if>
<xsl:if test="$usb2 > 0"> <data> <xsl:value-of select="$usb2" /> <xsl:text> USB 2.0 port</xsl:text> <xsl:if test="$usb2 > 1"> <xsl:text>s</xsl:text> </xsl:if> </data> </xsl:if>
<xsl:if test="$usb3 > 0"> <data> <xsl:value-of select="$usb3" /> <xsl:text> USB 3.0 port</xsl:text> <xsl:if test="$usb3 > 1"> <xsl:text>s</xsl:text> </xsl:if> </data> </xsl:if>
<xsl:if test="$usbC > 0"> <data> <xsl:value-of select="$usbC" /> <xsl:text> USB C port</xsl:text> <xsl:if test="$usbC > 1"> <xsl:text>s</xsl:text> </xsl:if> </data> </xsl:if>
<xsl:if test="$vga > 0"> <data> <xsl:value-of select="$vga" /> <xsl:text> VGA port</xsl:text> <xsl:if test="$vga > 1"> <xsl:text>s</xsl:text> </xsl:if> </data> </xsl:if> </xsl:variable>
<xsl:for-each select="msxsl:node-set($outputFragmentCollection)/*[. != '']"> <xsl:if test="position() > 1"><xsl:text>|</xsl:text></xsl:if> <xsl:value-of select="."/>
</xsl:for-each>

<!--freetext--> <xsl:variable name="batteryLife" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='BATLIFE']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="batteryType" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='BATTYPE']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="displayType" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='DSPLYTYPE']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="resolution" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='MAXRES']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="screenSize" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='SCRNSIZE']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="epeat" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='EPEATLVL']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="backlitKeyboard" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='LITKEY']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="builtinSpeakers" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='BLTINSPKRS']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="builtinMic" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='MIC']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="camRes" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='CAMRES']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="fingerprintReader" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='FINGERRDR']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="opticalDrive" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='OPTDR1']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="bluetoothVer" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='BLUETOOTHVER']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="touchscreen" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='TOUCH']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="cpuCores" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='CPUCORE']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="cpuCache" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='CPUCACHE']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="cpuSpeed" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='CPUSPEED']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="cpuNumber" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='CPUNUM']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="wifi" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='WIFICOMPAT']/q:Value/a:string[1]" />
<xsl:variable name="cpuCoresPhrasing" > <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="$cpuCores='1'"> <xsl:text>Single-core </xsl:text> </xsl:when>
<xsl:when test="$cpuCores='2'"> <xsl:text>Dual-core </xsl:text> </xsl:when>
<xsl:when test="$cpuCores='3'"> <xsl:text>Triple-core </xsl:text> </xsl:when>
<xsl:when test="$cpuCores='4'"> <xsl:text>Quad-core </xsl:text> </xsl:when>
<xsl:when test="$cpuCores='6'"> <xsl:text>6-core </xsl:text> </xsl:when>
<xsl:when test="$cpuCores='8'"> <xsl:text>8-core </xsl:text> </xsl:when> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable>
<xsl:variable name="cpuCachePhrasing" > <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="$cpuCache > 0 and $cpuCache < 1"> <xsl:value-of select="concat(' w/ ', $cpuCache * 1000, ' KB cache')" /> </xsl:when>
<xsl:when test="$cpuCache >= 1"> <xsl:value-of select="concat(' w/ ', $cpuCache, ' MB cache')" /> </xsl:when> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable>
<xsl:variable name="outputFragmentCollection"> <xsl:if test="$touchscreen = 'YES'"> <Value> <xsl:value-of select="'Touchscreen'" /> </Value> </xsl:if>
<xsl:if test="$backlitKeyboard = 'YES'"> <Value> <xsl:value-of select="'Backlit Keyboard'" /> </Value> </xsl:if> <xsl:if test="$camRes > 0"> <Value> <xsl:value-of select="'Built-In Webcam'" /> </Value> </xsl:if>
<xsl:if test="$wifi != 'Not Applicable'"> <Value> <xsl:value-of select="'Built-in Wi-Fi Adapter'" /> </Value> </xsl:if>
<xsl:if test="$builtinSpeakers = 'YES'"> <Value> <xsl:value-of select="'Built-in Speakers'" /> </Value> </xsl:if>
<xsl:if test="$batteryLife > 0"> <Value> <xsl:value-of select="concat($batteryLife, '-hour ', $batteryType, ' battery')" /> </Value> </xsl:if> <Value> <xsl:value-of select="concat($resolution, ' ', $screenSize, ' inch ', $displayType, ' display')" /> </Value>
<xsl:if test="$epeat != 'Not Applicable'"> <Value> <xsl:value-of select="concat('EPEAT ', $epeat, ' certified energy efficient')" /> </Value> </xsl:if>
<xsl:if test="$builtinMic = 'YES'"> <Value> <xsl:value-of select="'Built-In Microphone'" /> </Value> </xsl:if>
<xsl:if test="$fingerprintReader = 'YES'"> <Value> <xsl:value-of select="'Biometric Security (Fingerprint Reader) Included'" /> </Value> </xsl:if>
<xsl:if test="$opticalDrive != 'Not Applicable'"> <Value> <xsl:value-of select="$opticalDrive" /> </Value> </xsl:if>
<xsl:if test="$bluetoothVer != 'No Bluetooth'"> <Value> <xsl:value-of select="'Built-in Bluetooth Adapter'" /> </Value> </xsl:if>
<Value> <!--2.4 GHz Dual-core A123M processor--> <!--3.6 GHz Quad-core i5-3450 processor with 5 MB cache--> <xsl:value-of select="concat($cpuSpeed, ' GHz ', $cpuCoresPhrasing, ' ', $cpuNumber, ' cpu', $cpuCachePhrasing)" /> </Value> </xsl:variable>
<xsl:for-each select="msxsl:node-set($outputFragmentCollection)/*[. != '']"> <xsl:if test="position() > 1"><xsl:text>|</xsl:text></xsl:if> <xsl:value-of select="."/> </xsl:for-each>

<!--freetext, recommendations include Dedicated Graphics Integrated/On-Board Graphics Hybrid Graphics Dedizierte Grafik Integrierte Grafik Hybrid-Grafik-->
<!--Dedicated|Integrated|Hybrid--> <xsl:variable name="gpuType" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='GPUTYPE']/q:Value/a:string[1]" />
<xsl:variable name="map"> <item code="Dedicated">Dedicated Graphics</item> <item code="Dedicated">Dedizierte Grafik</item> <item code="Integrated">Integrated/On-Board Graphics</item> <item code="Integrated">Integrierte Grafik</item> <item code="Hybrid">Hybrid Graphics</item> <item code="Hybrid">Hybrid-Grafik</item> </xsl:variable>
<xsl:value-of select="msxsl:node-set($map)/item[@code=$gpuType]"/>

<xsl:variable name="qLifestyle" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='PCLIFESTYLE']/q:Value/a:string[1]" />
<xsl:variable name="qGraphics" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='GPUTYPE']/q:Value/a:string[1]" />
<xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="$qLifestyle='Business'"> <xsl:text>Workstation</xsl:text> </xsl:when>
<xsl:when test="$qLifestyle='Entertainment'"> <xsl:text>Casual Computing</xsl:text> </xsl:when>
<xsl:when test="$qLifestyle='All-in-One' and $qGraphics = 'Dedicated' "> <xsl:text>Graphics Design</xsl:text> </xsl:when>
<xsl:when test="$qLifestyle='All-in-One' and $qGraphics != 'Dedicated' "> <xsl:text>Casual Computing</xsl:text> </xsl:when>
<xsl:when test="$qLifestyle='Gaming'"> <xsl:text>Gaming</xsl:text> </xsl:when>
<xsl:when test="$qLifestyle='Education' and $qGraphics = 'Dedicated' "> <xsl:text>Graphics Design</xsl:text> </xsl:when>
<xsl:when test="$qLifestyle='Education' and $qGraphics != 'Dedicated' "> <xsl:text>Casual Computing</xsl:text> </xsl:when>
</xsl:choose>
